candidates.why: Direct cost / cost of sales line; best COGS match.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Only clear COGS candidate and semantically correct, even though preview values are blank.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket; likely includes selling/admin-type external costs.

Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|double. No explicit SG&A subtotal is present, so selected overhead components. Excluded depreciation/amortization/impairments and excluded the supplemental R&D row from XSGA because it appears below EBIT.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D line available; appears below EBIT and is marked supplemental, but still the best R&D mapping.

variables.notes: Mapped to the only dedicated R&D row. It appears below EBIT, so it was not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Net finance expense total, but underlying recurring components are available, so not preferred to avoid double counting.

Recurring finance-cost bucket; acceptable when granular components are incomplete.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses arising from accounts payable and taxes

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over the broader 'Financial expenses' total. Excluded FX items and excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid duplication.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total

Shareholder count, not equity.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate owners/parent equity line is available, so used 'Total equity'. Per rule, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income total, not balance sheet minority interest / NCI.

variables.notes: No balance sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest line is present. Because BE uses 'Total equity', MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
